# neon-cloud

Git-like versioning and collaboration for music apps. Works with WebsimSocket.

## Import

```javascript
// From apps/ or tools/:
import { CloudStore, createCloudStore, diffState, hasChanges } from '../../packages/neon-cloud/index.js';
```

## Quick Start

```javascript
const store = createCloudStore({
    room: new WebsimSocket(),
    getCurrentUser: () => websim.getCurrentUser(),
    generateCommitMessage: async (changes) => changes.summary[0] || 'Updated'
});

// Listen for events
store.on('loaded', ({ track, commit, data }) => {
    sequencer.deserialize(data);
});

store.on('committed', ({ track, commit }) => {
    showToast(`Saved: ${commit.message}`);
});

// Commit changes
await store.commit(sequencer.serialize(), { name: 'My Track', bpm: 120 });

// Load track
await store.loadTrack(trackId);
```

## CloudStore

### Constructor
```javascript
new CloudStore({
    room,                    // WebsimSocket instance
    getCurrentUser,          // () => Promise<{ username }>
    generateCommitMessage,   // (changes, prev, curr, opts) => Promise<string>
    diffConfig,              // Custom diff config (optional)
    collectionPrefix         // Namespace for collections (optional)
})
```

### Methods
```javascript
// Tracks
store.commit(data, { name, bpm, ... })     // Save changes, returns { track, commit }
store.loadTrack(trackId)                    // Load track by ID
store.loadTrackByName(owner, name)          // Load by owner/name
store.newTrack()                            // Start fresh track
store.deleteTrack(trackId)                  // Delete track

// History
store.getHistory(trackId)                   // Get commits for track
store.loadCommit(commitId)                  // Load specific version
store.isViewingHistory                      // True if viewing past commit

// Social
store.toggleLike(trackId)                   // Like/unlike track
store.recordPlay(trackId)                   // Record play count

// Feed
store.getFeed({ filter, page, pageSize })   // Get paginated feed
// filter: 'all' | 'mine'
// Returns: { items, total, page, pageSize, totalPages }

// State
store.hasChanges(currentData)               // Check for uncommitted changes
store.currentTrack                          // Current track object
store.currentCommitId                       // Current commit ID
store.tracks                                // All tracks array
store.commits                               // All commits array
```

### Events
```javascript
store.on('loaded', ({ track, commit, data }) => {})
store.on('committed', ({ track, commit, isNew }) => {})
store.on('deleted', ({ trackId }) => {})
store.on('liked', ({ trackId, liked, count }) => {})
store.on('played', ({ trackId, count }) => {})
store.on('tracks', (tracks) => {})
store.on('commits', (commits) => {})
store.on('change', ({ type, data }) => {})
store.on('error', (error) => {})
```

## Diffing

### diffState
```javascript
const changes = diffState(prevData, currData, config);
// Returns:
{
    isInitial: boolean,
    hasChanges: boolean,
    scalar: { field: { prev, curr } },
    objects: { field: { added: [], removed: [], modified: [] } },
    arrays: { field: { prevLength, currLength, changed } },
    summary: ['Changed BPM', 'Modified pattern A']
}
```

### hasChanges
```javascript
if (hasChanges(prevData, currData, config)) {
    // Data has changed
}
```

### Diff Config
```javascript
const config = {
    scalarFields: ['bpm', 'name'],           // Simple equality check
    objectFields: ['patterns', 'params'],     // Track key changes
    arrayFields: ['measures'],                // Track length/content
    ignoreFields: ['_id', 'updatedAt']        // Skip these fields
};
```

## Data Model

### Track
```javascript
{
    id, owner, name, thumbnailUrl,
    latestCommitId, rootTrackId, rootCommitId,
    stats: { plays, likes, commits },
    createdAt, updatedAt
}
```

### Commit
```javascript
{
    id, trackId, parentId, message,
    data: { /* serialized state */ },
    changes: { /* diff result */ },
    owner, createdAt
}
```

## Utilities

```javascript
import { timeAgo, deepEqual, generateId, debounce } from '../../packages/neon-cloud/index.js';

timeAgo(timestamp)        // '2 hours ago'
deepEqual(a, b)           // Deep object comparison
generateId()              // Random ID string
debounce(fn, ms)          // Debounced function
```

## Collections (WebsimSocket)

- `track_v1` - Track metadata
- `commit_v1` - Commit history
- `like_v1` - Likes
- `play_v1` - Play counts

Prefix with `collectionPrefix` option to namespace.
